text: Phantom Perps are not available in all jurisdictions. Referenced leverage reflects the highest maximum among newly listed markets. text: Phantom is not a bank. The Prepaid Debit Visa Card is issued by Lead Bank and managed by Bridge Ventures, LLC. Fees may apply. See Phantom's website for more details.

See Phantom's website for more details.' Each sentence is Direct, unhedged, terminological — Space-led structural orientation (naming entities, delimiting scope). Weight test: marginal — 'Phantom is not a bank' has the force of a regulatory boundary, so a light pressing element is defensible, but Light+Direct remains dominant.
